overall.description: First-person exploration through a neon-lit cyberpunk clothing market in a game engine. The player moves through narrow industrial corridors past mannequins, digital displays, and scattered NPCs, with prominent green and pink neon lighting reflecting off wet concrete floors.

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow cyberpunk market corridor with neon pink signage overhead. The camera moves past a character with spiked shoulder pads and approaches a PAY HERE counter with illuminated displays. White mannequins stand on glowing platforms amidst wet concrete floors reflecting the neon lights.

segments.scene_description: Moving past the PAY HERE counter, the scene transitions into a narrower corridor illuminated by green LED floor strips. Metal clothing racks line the right wall while a character sits in a black leather chair. The concrete walls and industrial pillars emphasize the gritty cyberpunk aesthetic.

segments.scene_description: The corridor opens into a wider market area with multiple digital advertising screens stacked in the background. The camera approaches a character wearing a green hooded jacket who is examining a handheld device. White mannequins stand in groups amidst clothing racks with bright LED lighting, while the green floor strip lighting continues along the right edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit cyberpunk market that transitions from a pink-hued corridor into a wider, green-illuminated commercial hub. It begins by gliding past a character with spiked shoulder pads and a PAY HERE counter, where white mannequins stand on glowing platforms above wet, reflective concrete. As the camera moves past the counter, the environment shifts into a narrower industrial passage defined by green LED floor strips, metal clothing racks, and a character resting in a black leather chair. The scene then opens into a broader market area where the green lighting persists along the right edge, leading the camera toward a character in a green hooded jacket. Finally, the view expands to reveal stacked digital advertising screens and groups of mannequins under bright LED lighting.
